application_profile.product: local CLI, installer, and loopback Observatory
audiences: people without prior Agentic SDLC knowledge

constraints: Plain language must come before internal terms and identifiers.
Preserve Node.js 18.18+ compatibility and zero mandatory runtime dependencies.
Presets must never authorize protected actions or widen scope.
Installer check and plan are read-only; apply is plan-hash-bound and reversible.

evidence.excerpt: acceptance_criteria Effective configuration is versioned hash-locked explainable and migrated only through a reviewed plan hash; plugin upgrades cannot silently activate authority autonomy gate or budget defaults. A versioned workflow-definition and event-sourced workflow-instance engine supports software-project change-request technical-assessment and generic-governed-process presets without replacing the existing six SDLC execution phases. Requirement ceilings and a separate non-reusable delivery profile preserve an explicit autonomy choice for every pull request or local release with fail-c

approvals.summary: Approved within Antonio's enterprise-program delegation: use only local project evidence and local Node/Python checks to make CLI, installer, and Observatory understandable in English and Italian; no installs, external services, secrets, production access, destructive actions, or scope expansion.

scope.principle: An automation approval is valid only under an explicit delegated approval level or configured automation policy recorded in the summary or evidence.
scope.approval_level: Autonomous completion of approved requirement REQ-ENTERPRISE-CONTROL-PLANE-001-R2 through the eight reserved local delivery stories only.
